x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Standardize close codes and enforce selection via UI policy at incident closure. Target: 80%+ of closed incidents with close code in the trailing 12 months.
